meta.title: Cross-Reference Map
meta.boundary: This map shows symbolic design relationships, not psychological measurements, diagnosis, prediction, or human scoring.

relationshipTypes.buffer: One formula softens, stabilizes, or repairs another.
relationshipTypes.amplifier: One formula can increase the pressure of another.
relationshipTypes.repair_path: One formula suggests a healthier or clearer next step.
relationshipTypes.contrast: The formulas help define each other by difference.
relationshipTypes.sequence: One formula often leads into the next.
relationshipTypes.example_pair: Strong pair for compare mode or teaching examples.

edges.label: Same division structure, different emotional payload: absurdity over emotional reaction in comedy, assumptions over evidence in drama.
Both model format collapse: one through playful disruption, the other through public emotional escalation.
Calm provides breath, orientation, and safety against threat forecasting and uncertainty spirals.
Anger names harm, violation, and need; love and repair can rebuild trust without erasing the boundary.
Memory, witness, safety, and presence can carry both ache and lift without forcing either feeling away.
Shame pressure can soften through compassion, witness, trust, and repair.
Calm can create enough safety and orientation for joy and wonder to become noticeable.
Assumptions over evidence can feed uncertainty, imagination, and threat forecasting.
Calm does not erase anger; it can help turn boundary fire into clearer action.
Grief echoes attachment and memory; love gives witness, repair, and continuity language.

learningPaths.title: Fear to Calm Path
learningPaths.description: A gentle path from threat forecasting toward safety, orientation, and possible hope.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: This path is a symbolic reflection/design sequence, not clinical anxiety guidance.

learningPaths.title: Boundary to Repair Path
learningPaths.description: A path from violated need toward clarity, repair, trust, and compassionate bridging.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: This path does not excuse harm or force reconciliation.

learningPaths.title: Comedy / Drama Mirror Path
learningPaths.description: A path showing how similar structures can become laughter or tension depending on context.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: These are craft mirrors, not emotional rankings.

learningPaths.title: Grief to Wonder Path
learningPaths.description: A gentle path where memory, witness, presence, and wonder can coexist without forced positivity.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: Grief has no deadline; this path is not a schedule or solution.
